featured.title: 🔴 Icon Apparel Co. 188 | Moonshiners Racing League | North Wilkesboro | iRacing
featured.description:
🏁 LIVE at 8:00 PM ET! The GMD Janitorial Cup Series, part of the Moonshiners Racing League, heads to EchoPark Speedway for the Barry M. Deeper 250! Watch the full race as the top drivers in the league battle it out on iRacing, broadcast live on Precision Entertainment. Who will take home the checkered flag at Atlanta?

-- EVENT DETAILS --
🔹 League: Moonshiners Racing League (MRL)
🔹 Series: GMD Janitorial Cup Series
🔹 Event: Icon Apparel Co. 188
🔹 Track: North Wilkesboro Speedway
🔹 Game: iRacing
🔹 Start Time: 8:00 PM ET

-- ABOUT US --
Precision Entertainment (PE) is where broadcast-quality esports meets race-craft. We provide full event coverage with professional commentary and graphics for sim racing leagues. Whether you're here to watch your favorite drivers, improve your own race-craft, or just enjoy the action, you're in the right paddock.

Watch. Learn. Go faster.

-- CONNECT WITH US --

👍 LIKE the video to help support the channel and the league!
